verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When my life's burdens get so heavy And it seems I'm all alone I cast my care on Jesus And come boldly to His throne I find His grace sufficient When His promises I heed For His very life He sacrificed And He lives to intercede

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is the Lord of Lords And when He speaks Winds and waves obey When Jesus whispers "Peace be still" Then darkness turns to day And as I'm trusting in my saviors word Doubts and fears all cease And beneath the shelter of His wings I'm at rest in perfect peace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will seek for souls in darkness Calvary's love with them to share Empowered by His spirit I will follow anywhere For I know what I've befall me My Lord is in control And as my mind is stayed on Him Perfect peace He gives my soul
